name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: Las Vegas, NV title loans at TitleMax on Fort Apache Rd — quick cash using your vehicle as collateral.
description_long:
TitleMax Title Loans operates this Las Vegas location at 3525 S Fort Apache Rd Ste. 160, in the South Las Vegas area near the Fort Apache corridor. The storefront is open Monday through Friday from 10 AM to 7 PM, Saturday 10 AM to 4 PM, and closed on Sundays. As a standalone title loan shop, it serves residents throughout the south and southwest Las Vegas valley.

This location provides title loans—a form of secured lending where your vehicle serves as collateral. Whether you need emergency funds, unexpected expenses, or quick access to cash in Las Vegas, NV, the team here can often approve loans within hours. Call +1 702-362-0054 to discuss your vehicle's value and eligibility.

For Las Vegas residents considering a title loan, bring your vehicle's title, valid ID, and proof of residency. Title loans can be faster than traditional bank loans when you need funds urgently. TitleMax handles title transactions across multiple locations, with this South Fort Apache branch serving the southwest Las Vegas community directly.
address: 3525 S Fort Apache Rd Ste. 160, Las Vegas, NV 89147

company_info.headquarters: 3525 S Fort Apache Rd Ste. 160, Las Vegas, NV 89147

pros: Same-day cash approval and funding for qualified applicants
Accepts most credit types, not based solely on credit score
Allows borrowers to keep driving their vehicle while it secures the loan
Offers flexible line-of-credit structures with incremental withdrawal options
Bilingual staff available at this location
Extended operating hours (9am-7pm most weekdays, Saturday hours available)
Strong local customer satisfaction with 481+ Google reviews at 5.0/5 rating
cons: Title loans are high-cost emergency products with vehicle repossession risk if payments default
APR rates not disclosed on website, making true cost comparison difficult
Requires clear vehicle title, excluding customers without clean automotive ownership
Unsecured line of credit only available in 11 specific states, excluding most of the country
Credit check still performed despite marketing to consumers with poor credit
best_for: Consumers with vehicle equity who need emergency cash within 24 hours
Borrowers with poor credit history who cannot qualify for traditional personal loans
Individuals in the 11-state service area seeking fast unsecured lines of credit
diagnosis: TitleMax is best for consumers with vehicle equity who need emergency cash immediately and cannot qualify for traditional bank loans, particularly those with poor credit. The main caveat is that title loans are inherently high-cost products with vehicle repossession risk; borrowers should only use these if absolutely necessary for genuine emergencies, as the true APR and long-term cost are not transparent on the website.
services: Title pledge loans secured by vehicle titles
Flex lines of credit secured by vehicle titles
Unsecured personal lines of credit (in-store and online)
Online loan application and management portal
Credit limit increases on established lines of credit
meta_description: Las Vegas title loans at TitleMax, 3525 S Fort Apache Rd, NV. Quick cash on your vehicle, same-day approval.
